clusters.name: OpenAI Acquires OpenClaw/Steinberger
clusters.summary: OpenAI acquired OpenClaw, the viral open-source AI agent project, and hired its founder Peter Steinberger. The move comes after Anthropic sent Steinberger a cease-and-desist over trademark issues with the Claude-based tool. Community reaction is mixed, with speculation about acquisition price (potentially $10B+) and concerns about whether OpenAI will keep it open source.
